channel.title: Abouts on Bailey’s Cybersecurity Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Bailey’s Cybersecurity Portfolio

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hi, I’m Bailey — an aspiring penetration tester and red teamer.

Currently studying for CompTIA Security+ and working through TryHackMe’s learning paths and challenges.

This portfolio will document my journey, skills, and writeups.
